title.en: Medical devices — Quality management systems — Requirements for regulatory purposes
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 质量管理体系 - 用于法规的要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for a quality management system where an organization needs to demonstrate its ability to provide medical devices that consistently meet applicable regulatory requirements.

title.en: Medical devices - Quality management systems - Requirements for regulatory purposes - Amendment 1
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 质量管理体系 - 用于法规的要求 - 修正案1

standards.abstract: Amendment 1 to ISO 13485:2016. Provides editorial and technical updates to the medical device QMS standard.
standards.scope: Amendment to the quality management system standard for medical devices.

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on auditing management systems, including principles of auditing, managing an audit programme, conducting management system audits, and competence of auditors. Edition 3.
standards.scope: Auditing guidelines for quality management systems (applicable to ISO 13485 audits).

title.en: Medical devices - Quality management systems - Guidance on the application of ISO 13485:2003
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 质量管理体系 - ISO 13485:2003应用指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on the application of ISO 13485 for medical device manufacturers. While written for ISO 13485:2003, the principles remain applicable. Confirmed 2020.
standards.scope: Guidance on QMS application for medical device manufacturers.
standards.note: Under revision to align with ISO 13485:2016.

title.en: Guidance on the application of ISO 13485 to organizations that provide servicing of medical devices
title.zh: 关于将ISO 13485应用于提供医疗器械维修服务的组织的指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance for organizations that service medical devices on implementing ISO 13485 quality management system requirements.
standards.scope: QMS guidance for medical device servicing organizations.
